title: RenewalOutreachDraftRequest
description: Engine request to persist a generated/edited renewal outreach draft as a renewal ActivityTimelineEvent (F0038-S0005). Generating a draft does NOT transition the renewal (transition fires only on mock-send, F0038-S0006). Authorized engine-side by renewal:draft_outreach (Underwriter only). The persisted event is InternalOnly, labelled AI-generated draft, and carries full provenance. Content constraints (no premium/quote/coverage-terms/binding-commitment language) are validated before persistence.

draft_body.description: Generated or user-edited draft text. Must not state or imply premium, quote figures, coverage terms, or any binding commitment.

internal_only.description: Always true until a human edits/approves; the draft is never externally visible automatically.

provenance.description: Audit/provenance recorded on the timeline event. No raw prompt or raw model response is stored (ADR-027 security notes).

model.description: Model id used for generation, e.g. claude-opus-4-8.

content_hash.description: Hash of the persisted draft_body for tamper-evidence and edit detection.

agent_run_id.description: Neuron agent_run id linking the engine event back to the Neuron operation record (idempotency/reconciliation, ADR-028).
